XenotypeDef.label: elsen
XenotypeDef.description: Born from a post-apocalyptic rimworld, they are highly anxious and highly industrious. They struggle to function without a superior to give them direction, which makes them far more prone to mental breaks. Thankfully, they are incredibly driven workers with resistance to extreme climates and pollution, in addition to requiring little sustainance - this alone is enough to earn them a place as laborers in all but the most hostile of settlements.
XenotypeDef.descriptionShort: Elsen are meek, inherently neurotic laborers. They eat very little and work very quickly, in addition to having resistances to high temperatures, low temperatures, and pollution. However, they are deaf to psychic influence, poorly suited for most forms of combat, and suffer more mental breaks as a result of their rapid-fire neural pathways.
